records.ety: [Cf. F. civilizer, fr.L. civilis civil. See Civil.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Civilized (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Civilizing.]

defs: To reclaim from a savage state; to instruct in the rules and customs of civilization; to educate; to refine.
quotes: Yet blest that fate which did his arms dispose Her land to civilize, as to subdue.

defs: To admit as suitable to a civilized state.
